scripts.build: astro check && astro build && node scripts/write-sitemap-alias.mjs
scripts.format: oxfmt --write "src/**/*.{astro,ts,tsx,js,jsx,css}" astro.config.mjs content.config.ts postcss.config.js package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check "src/**/*.{astro,ts,tsx,js,jsx,css}" astro.config.mjs content.config.ts postcss.config.js package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.deploy:cf: pnpm build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name yomitomo
